$comment: Project-scoped MCP servers for Claude Code. These activate the moment their API keys are present in the environment (see .env.example → 'External tooling / MCP'). A server whose key is missing simply shows as unavailable — it never breaks the repo. Only the two tools that genuinely fit this codebase are wired here (up-to-date library docs + web scraping); the rest are documented, with ready-to-paste snippets, in docs/tooling-setup.md.
